response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly capable engineer whose technical skills clearly overlap with the role's requirements — TypeScript, React, REST APIs, and even Kubernetes and LLM integration are all present. However, he is severely overqualified: 15+ years of experience across Staff and Senior roles makes a Junior/Mid IC position an implausible fit. He is also based in Bangalore, India, which directly conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement of what appears to be a Berlin-area team. Even if technically interested, retention risk and role mismatch make this a poor allocation of interview time for both parties.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise directly matching the core stack, with production-scale experience at Optilyz and re:cinq
Hands-on LLM/agentic tooling experience (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) satisfying the strongest nice-to-have
Kubernetes and AWS CDK exposure, plus a decade of full-stack and cross-platform delivery across multiple industries
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior titles spanning 15+ years of experience do not map to a junior/mid individual contributor role
Located in Bangalore, India, directly incompatible with the high on-site presence requirement
No explicit PostgreSQL or NestJS experience mentioned; SQL and MongoDB noted but relational depth for the target stack is unverified
